SVS-1.subject: Sage™

identity_change_policy.rule: SVS-1 is a constitutional identity asset, the voice counterpart to SAGE-AVATAR-1. Which voice SVS-1 resolves to may only change through explicit Founder approval.
permitted_without_founder_approval: provider-side technical settings that do not change perceived identity (e.g. stability/similarity tuning within the approved voice)
requires_explicit_founder_approval: any change that would make Sage sound like a different person

SVS-1.provider_notes: Application code must never reference provider_voice_id directly -- it asks the voice resolver for SVS-1 and the resolver returns the provider + provider_voice_id together. This keeps a future provider change (or a second product needing the same institutional voice) a one-line registry edit, not a code change.
SVS-1.tone_reference: See brand/design_standards/SAGE_PERSONA.md — Voice Tone: warm, calm, confident, patient, knowledgeable, never rushed, never sales-like, never overly enthusiastic, never theatrical.
SVS-1.governance_note: SVS-1 (how Sage sounds), SAGE-AVATAR-1 (how Sage looks), SAGE_PERSONA.md (who Sage is), and DS-1 (how she is presented) are tracked as distinct, non-merged identities. This registration does not alter any of the other three.
